rationale: The US-Iran deal remains the dominant story with direct policy and market implications for Americans; other items are continuations or noise.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: Trump says Sunday signing, Tehran disputes
top_events.summary: Trump announced a deal signing for Sunday but Iran's side cast doubt on the timeline, leaving a major geopolitical and oil-market outcome unresolved. Americans face continued uncertainty on Middle East policy and energy prices.

top_events.title: US kills Tren de Aragua leader in air strike
top_events.summary: Trump announced a US airstrike killed the leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang, continuing the administration's pattern of targeted strikes against criminal organizations. Limited direct impact on most Americans' daily lives.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends new AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: Anthropic continues to hold back new AI tool releases due to federal security review — an ongoing policy constraint with modest impact on US tech sector and consumers.
